# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Build and create artifacts
        run: |
          # build process here
          mkdir -p deploy
          cp -r dist/* deploy/

  deploy-stage-1:
    needs: [build-artifacts]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: deploy-artifacts
          path: deploy/artifacts
      - name: Execute deployment script 1
        run: |
          # deployment process for stage 1 here

  deploy-stage-2:
    needs: [deploy-stage-1]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: deploy-artifacts
          path: deploy/artifacts
      - name: Execute deployment script 2
        run: |
          # deployment process for stage 2 here

  deploy-stage-3:
    needs: [deploy-stage-2]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: deploy-artifacts
          path: deploy/artifacts
      - name: Execute deployment script 3
        run: |
          # deployment process for stage 3 here
